seoTitle: Millswood vs Mimili — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Millswood and Mimili. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Millswood and Mimili.
heading: Millswood vs Mimili — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Millswood, South Australia and Mimili, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mimili has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Millswood (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Millswood or Mimili safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Millswood has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Mimili scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Millswood scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Mimili scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Millswood or Mimili?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mimili has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
